name: Intune / Endpoint Manager delegation
description: Permission groups for Microsoft Intune (Endpoint Manager). These are workload groups: Intune assigns its built-in RBAC roles directly to the Entra group (deviceAndAppManagementRoleAssignment), optionally bounded by scope tags - no Entra directory role involved. Ships the standard Intune built-in personas - Help Desk Operator, School Administrator, Application Manager, Endpoint Security Manager, Read Only Operator, and Policy and Profile Manager.

PIM-Definitions-Services.GroupDescription: Intune - Help Desk Operator (remote tasks, view configs; day-to-day support)
Intune - Read Only Operator (view devices, apps, configs; no changes)
Intune - Application Manager (manage mobile and managed apps)
Intune - Policy and Profile Manager (compliance, configuration profiles, baselines)
Intune - Endpoint Security Manager (security baselines, EDR, ASR, encryption)
Intune - School Administrator (Intune for Education device and app management)
